title: Train and Develop Staff | USCIS
content:
## Train and Develop Staff
The following set of resources can help you train and develop staff and volunteers in your citizenship program. Use the coordinator and educator guides to develop the knowledge and skills necessary to successfully coordinate and/or teach in a citizenship program. The online training modules can help prepare your program volunteers and teachers before they participate in classes. This set of resources also includes information on a variety of in-person training seminars that can help you develop and maintain a citizenship program, in addition to building connections with other service providers in your community.
- The Professional Development Guide for Adult Citizenship Educators Tip sheet: Using the Professional Development Guide for Adult Citizenship Educators
- Tip sheet: Using the Professional Development Guide for Adult Citizenship Educators
- Adult Citizenship Education Program Coordinator Skills and Knowledge Guide
- Volunteer Training: Adult Citizenship Education Strategies for Volunteers
- The English Language Learner University
- English Literacy and Civics Education  (PDF)
- Literacy Assistance Center
- National Reporting System
- REEP ESL Curriculum for Adults
